title: Refreshing Raw Australian Fish Poke
description: A kid-friendly Australian dish featuring sashimi-cut fish, clotted cream, and peppery flavors, this raw fish poke is a Whole30-friendly and refreshing meal option. It is made with glassy-jelly like texture and extra clotted cream.

ingredients.name: Sashimi-grade fish
ingredients.notes: Australian caught, such as tuna or salmon

instructions: Cut the sashimi-grade fish into small cubes and place them in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together the clotted cream, lime juice, sesame oil, honey, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the cream mixture over the fish and toss to coat.
Top the fish with thinly sliced red onion and chopped fresh cilantro.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the fish a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the poke in small bowls or glasses and enjoy.
Garnish with additional cilantro and onion if desired.
